description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a low boundary wall and featuring a spacious yard with both paved and grassy areas. The main building has a dark exterior with large, rectangular windows and several white-framed doors, providing ample natural light. The property includes a detached garage with space for two cars, a swimming pool, a trampoline, and a small play structure, all set within a landscaped garden. The backyard is equipped with lounge chairs and a covered patio area, ideal for outdoor relaxation and gatherings. The roof is flat, and the overall layout is open, with clear separation between living spaces and outdoor amenities. The arrangement of trees and shrubs along the perimeter adds privacy and greenery to the urban setting.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a detached garage, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool, patio, and play areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, detached garage with two cars, and a row of trees along the side.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the swimming pool, lounge chairs, trampoline, and backyard patio area.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the covered patio, trampoline, and the garage with visible driveway and trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the play structure, trampoline, and a car parked outside the garage.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large rectangular windows on multiple facades
